introSection: Euro-Mir is a Mack Rides spinning roller coaster located at Europa-Park in Rust, Baden Wuerttemberg, Germany. The ride opened on 12 June 1997. It is also the first Spinning Coaster installation from Mack Rides.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Euro Mir opened on 12 June 1997. It was the first spinning coaster from manufacturing firm Mack Rides. The theming for the ride was done by P&P Projects.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: While the ride does have spinning cars, unlike other future spinning coasters from Mack, the spinning is controlled and is not activated for the entire layout.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Blue track and white supports. The track inside the building is black, and the supports throughout the first half of the ride are blue.

fullText:
Euro-Mir is a Mack Rides spinning roller coaster located at Europa-Park in Rust, Baden Wuerttemberg, Germany. The ride opened on 12 June 1997. It is also the first Spinning Coaster installation from Mack Rides.

Euro Mir opened on 12 June 1997. It was the first spinning coaster from manufacturing firm Mack Rides. The theming for the ride was done by P&P Projects.

While the ride does have spinning cars, unlike other future spinning coasters from Mack, the spinning is controlled and is not activated for the entire layout.

Blue track and white supports. The track inside the building is black, and the supports throughout the first half of the ride are blue.
